name: maze of caves
description: I'm in a maze of caves
hints: This is a dead-end area of the cave maze. Head back the way you came.
SOUTH or EAST both lead to the hill foot. WEST goes back to room 13.
Go SOUTH or EAST to exit the caves at the hill foot (room 14).
notes: Dead-end cave maze room. SOUTH and EAST both exit to the hill foot (room 14). WEST returns to room 13.
